do: Derive values from existing state; lift shared state to the nearest common ancestor
dont: Don't duplicate or sync state that can be computed
note: Less state means fewer bugs and re-renders

do: Return a cleanup for subscriptions and timers; prefer event handlers over effects
dont: Don't fetch in useEffect when a framework loader or SWR will do
note: Effects are for syncing with external systems only

do: Memoize only proven-expensive components and stable callbacks
dont: Don't wrap everything in memo/useMemo by reflex
note: Premature memoization adds noise without measured wins

do: Use stable unique keys when rendering lists
dont: Don't use array index as key for reorderable lists
note: Index keys corrupt state on insert/reorder

do: Wrap non-urgent updates in startTransition
dont: Don't block the UI on every keystroke or filter
note: Keeps typing responsive while heavy work defers

do: Virtualize or use content-visibility for long lists
dont: Don't render thousands of rows at once
note: Off-screen work is wasted work

do: Default to Server Components for static and data content
dont: Don't slap 'use client' on everything
note: Server Components ship zero JS and fetch closer to data

do: Start fetches early and await late; parallelize independent ones
dont: Don't chain sequential awaits creating request waterfalls
note: Parallel fetching cuts time-to-first-byte

do: Use App Router with loading.tsx and error.tsx per route
dont: Don't hand-roll loading/error UI in page bodies
note: File conventions give streaming and error boundaries free

do: Use next/image for sizing lazy-loading and formats
dont: Don't drop raw with no dimensions
note: Built-in optimization prevents layout shift

do: dynamic() import heavy or below-fold components
dont: Don't import heavy widgets at module top level
note: Code-splitting shrinks the initial bundle

do: Keep secrets server-side; only expose NEXT_PUBLIC_ vars
dont: Don't leak API keys into client components
note: Anything in the client bundle is public

do: Theme via CSS variables in :root and .dark
dont: Don't hardcode colors inside components
note: CSS-var theming flips dark mode with one class

do: Compose the provided primitives to build features
dont: Don't fork a component just to restyle it
note: Owning the source means you patch not fight it

do: Install via the CLI after running init
dont: Don't copy-paste component files by hand
note: The CLI wires aliases and dependencies correctly

do: Add variants with cva instead of conditional class soup
dont: Don't sprinkle inline conditionals for every state
note: cva centralizes a component's style API

do: Keep the Radix primitive's built-in a11y wiring
dont: Don't strip aria attributes or focus management
note: Radix handles roles focus and keyboard for you

do: Override styles via className with the cn() merge helper
dont: Don't edit ui/ internals for one-off tweaks
note: cn() resolves Tailwind conflicts predictably

do: Use @State for local and @Observable/@Binding for shared
dont: Don't keep one giant source of truth in a parent
note: Right ownership scope avoids needless view updates

do: Keep views small and compose with ViewBuilder
dont: Don't build a 500-line body
note: Small views recompute cheaply and read clearly

do: Use stacks and layout priority over fixed frames
dont: Don't hardcode pixel frames for dynamic content
note: Adaptive layout survives Dynamic Type and rotation

do: Use List/LazyVStack with Identifiable data
dont: Don't load all rows eagerly in a ScrollView
note: Lazy containers render only visible rows

do: Support Dynamic Type and label controls
dont: Don't fix font sizes or ship unlabeled icons
note: VoiceOver and large type are baseline on iOS

do: Animate with withAnimation and respect Reduce Motion
dont: Don't animate every state change unconditionally
note: Honoring Reduce Motion is an accessibility requirement

do: Prefer StatelessWidget and const constructors
dont: Don't make everything stateful
note: const widgets skip rebuilds for free

do: Call setState only in callbacks and keep it scoped
dont: Don't call setState during build
note: Scoped state limits the rebuild subtree

do: Use Expanded/Flexible inside Row and Column
dont: Don't ignore overflow warnings
note: Flex widgets prevent yellow-stripe overflow

do: Use ListView.builder for long or infinite lists
dont: Don't build all children up front with ListView(children:)
note: builder lazily constructs only visible items

do: Centralize colors and text in ThemeData
dont: Don't hardcode colors per widget
note: A single theme keeps light/dark consistent

do: Add keys when widget identity matters in lists
dont: Don't omit keys on reorderable stateful items
note: Keys preserve element state across reorders

do: Define styles with StyleSheet.create
dont: Don't pass new inline style objects each render
note: StyleSheet avoids recreating objects every render

do: Use FlatList/SectionList for long data
dont: Don't map arrays inside a ScrollView
note: FlatList virtualizes and recycles rows

do: Branch platform differences with Platform.select
dont: Don't assume one platform's spacing fits both
note: iOS and Android have distinct interaction norms

do: Use Pressable with hitSlop for small targets
dont: Don't ship sub-44pt tappable areas
note: hitSlop expands the touch zone without resizing UI

do: Use React Navigation with typed routes and deep links
dont: Don't roll a custom navigator from scratch
note: React Navigation handles gestures and history correctly

do: Cache and size remote images (e.g. FastImage)
dont: Don't render full-resolution images unsized
note: Proper sizing and caching cut memory and jank
